✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

Async image loading: WebImage — SwiftUI view with SDWebImage's loading + caching underneath. Requires the SDWebImage companion package.

Animated GIF playback: AnimatedImage plays GIF/APNG/WebP animations — fenced !os(watchOS), same gap as Kingfisher's. Requires the SDWebImage companion package.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of sdwebimageswiftui? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
